mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert ( circuit_id, panel_id, source, type, result_id, status ) VALUES ( #{circuitId}, #{panelId}, #{source}, #{type}, #{resultId}, #{status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.alert_id, p.name AS panel_name, c.channel_no AS circuit_no, a.type, a.status, a.triggered_at
ORDER BY CASE a.status WHEN 'UNCONFIRMED' THEN 1 WHEN 'CONFIRMED' THEN 2 WHEN 'RESOLVED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, a.triggered_at DESC, a.alert_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.alert_id, s.name AS site_name, p.name AS panel_name, c.channel_no AS circuit_no, a.type, a.source, a.status, a.triggered_at, confirmer.name AS confirmed_by_name, a.confirmed_at, a.resolved_at, a.resolution_note
ORDER BY a.triggered_at DESC, a.alert_id DESC

SELECT a.alert_id, a.circuit_id, a.panel_id, a.source, a.type, a.result_id, a.status, a.triggered_at, a.confirmed_by, a.confirmed_at, a.resolved_at, a.resolution_note FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id WHERE a.alert_id = #{alertId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_site us WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.site_id = p.site_id AND us.deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE alert SET status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_by = #{userId}, confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND status = 'UNCONFIRMED'
